reviews.author: Shaarav Gupta
reviews.review_body:
Like the people who can't get in write a bad review, that is your own problem, I have being studying in this school since mont and people who don't even know what the school is like write bad reviews just to lower the rating. like how are you people?
This school is actually very good

reviews.school_name: Step by Step School Sector 132 - Block B,Sector 132
reviews.author: jasmine bakshi
reviews.review_body: Had a really bad experience with Step by step school Noida.. My daughter recently shifted from UK and we wanted her to join this school. Initially they asked for 2.5 hours of assessment for which no syllabus was defined and then they said she did not clear the written assessment . First of all they were not considerate of the fact that for past 2.5 years my daughter has not studied Hindi and they failed her which really affected my child then there admission councelor Shalini Joshi called us and told she is selected for round 2 on Friday, my daughter statted preparing for the Friday interview and on Friday when we called her again she said there must be some confusion that we told you to come for round 2. This was absolutely unethical at their end as my daughter was heart broken. I think this school only needs cream of students and don't want to put any effort in a student who wants to learn but due to her situation a little behind .

reviews.school_name: Step by Step School Sector 132 - Block B,Sector 132
reviews.author: Muruli GR
reviews.review_body:
Great education facility with top class teaching methods and mind-blowing extra curricular activities. Imagine school has 500 persons seating atrium, full-sized swimming pool, indoor stadium for multi games, auditorium never please whole facility is air conditioned. Built on a large 10acre plot.
No doubt it is international level school.

reviews.school_name: Step by Step School Sector 132 - Block B,Sector 132
reviews.author: Kabir Nath
reviews.review_body: It's concerning how this school is overwhelming high schoolers with excessive tests and denying them a much-needed break after their 11th. Students deserve adequate rest and a fair academic environment. Education should inspire, not burden.

reviews.school_name: Step by Step School Sector 132 - Block B,Sector 132
reviews.author: user ets9
reviews.review_body: They dont open admission from Nursery to 5th standard at all. Only pre-nursery admissions are opened for next year. I spoke on the number provided on their website for primary admission. This should be posted online on their site too.
